title: Felted CGI
description: Ce style reproduit le rendu d'animation 3D haut de gamme caractérisé par une matérialité tactile distincte, semblable à du feutre, appliquée aux sujets. Il se distingue par des couleurs vibrantes et très saturées, un éclairage de studio doux avec des lumières de contour prononcées, et une faible profondeur de champ qui floute les éléments d'arrière-plan géométriques tout en gardant le point focal d'une netteté absolue.
description_en: This style replicates high-end 3D animation rendering characterized by a distinct tactile, felt-like materiality applied to subjects. It features vibrant, highly saturated colors, studio-quality soft lighting with prominent rim lights, and a shallow depth of field that blurs geometric background elements while keeping the focal point razor-sharp.
description_fr: Ce style reproduit le rendu d'animation 3D haut de gamme caractérisé par une matérialité tactile distincte, semblable à du feutre, appliquée aux sujets. Il se distingue par des couleurs vibrantes et très saturées, un éclairage de studio doux avec des lumières de contour prononcées, et une faible profondeur de champ qui floute les éléments d'arrière-plan géométriques tout en gardant le point focal d'une netteté absolue.
prompt: High-fidelity 3D CGI rendering, characterized by a highly stylized, tactile plush toy and felted fabric aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies heavily on dense, meticulously groomed micro-fur, fleece, and felt particle systems covering organic and soft surfaces, contrasting against smooth, matte subsurface scattering on hard props or structural elements. The lighting anatomy is a professional studio setup: a soft, luminous key light casts gentle gradients, while intense, glowing rim lights and kickers strongly separate the elements from the environment. Shadows are heavily filled with warm bounce light, preventing any deep black crushing. The color grading utilizes a highly saturated, vibrant, and cheerful palette, heavily featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant hue, structurally supported by {{secondary_color}}, with vivid {{accent_color}} highlights drawing the eye. The spatial dynamics employ a noticeably shallow depth of field, rendering the immediate foreground and distant background elements with a smooth, creamy bokeh blur, while the central focal plane remains razor-sharp, highlighting the individual fibers of the felted textures. Edges of the subjects are organically softened by the micro-fuzz, devoid of any line work or harsh geometric cuts. The background consists of simplified, untextured, geometric shapes bathed in a smooth gradient atmosphere. The image must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space as a canvas rule: no borders, no frames, no white margins, no canvas edges, full bleed to all four corners.

background_prompt: A stylized 3D rendered environment featuring simplified, untextured geometric shapes and smooth, matte structural elements. The atmosphere is bathed in a soft, luminous pastel gradient skyline. A professional 3D studio lighting setup casts gentle gradients and luminous bounce light across the landscape. The color palette is highly saturated and vibrant, dominated by {{primary_color}} volumetric lighting, supported by {{secondary_color}} shadows, and accented with {{accent_color}} highlights on the geometric peaks. The scene utilizes a shallow depth of field, creating a creamy bokeh effect on distant forms.
background_prompt_removebg: A stylized 3D rendered environment featuring simplified, untextured geometric shapes and smooth, matte structural elements. The atmosphere is bathed in a soft, luminous pastel gradient skyline. A professional 3D studio lighting setup casts gentle gradients and luminous bounce light across the landscape. The color palette is highly saturated and vibrant, dominated by {{primary_color}} volumetric lighting, supported by {{secondary_color}} shadows, and accented with {{accent_color}} highlights on the geometric peaks. The scene utilizes a shallow depth of field, creating a creamy bokeh effect on distant forms. In the foreground, a decorative frame of floating 3D felted shapes and plush spheres creates deep spatial layering, transitioning smoothly into a flat {{background_color}} surface.
